description: Two BT4 cards that together anchor Colossal Warfare's Time Breaker mechanical-narrative architecture: Demigra (BT4-107) as Bandai's confirmed set-antagonist orchestrator and Dark Kamehameha (BT4-121) as the Mira-Leader-locked Time Breaker capstone Extra. Both are ip_verified, both have trivia citing the BT4 design-concept page, and both already cross-cited each other in the pre-Edgelord `### Related cards` block; this edge formalizes the pre-existing cross-cite as a Connections-section bidirectional link. The edge survives the xenoverse-villains parent-node addition because it's the narrower set-specific mechanical-narrative anchor pair (BT4-set-internal), structurally analogous to the Mogis priest pair within the theros-pantheon parent.
citations: [BT4-121 card text: Mira-Leader-locked Dark Kamehameha rules-text]
[Dragon Ball Wiki: Demigra and Time Breakers]
